questions.question: What are the main functions of the MAC OCI Tool?
questions.justification: The synthesis text lists the main functions of the MAC OCI Tool, including providing firmware update functionality for HP displays on the MAC platform, integrating the OCI DLL and hub framework, implementing code signing for EXE and DLL files, and implementing a protection mechanism to only allow GL Hub to use the tool.

questions.question: What are the key components of the MAC OCI Tool architecture?
questions.justification: The synthesis text describes the key components of the MAC OCI Tool architecture, including the OCI DLL, Hub Framework, code signing functionality, command-line tool, and protection mechanism.

questions.question: Where can I find more information about the HP OCI DLL and HID code signing records?
questions.justification: The synthesis text provides links to the relevant documents for the HP OCI DLL and HID code signing records.
